Document:
# Magistrate The Magistrate is the ultimate judge of space law on the station, and is considered an advisor to the station.
1. The Magistrate is responsible for ensuring that those prisoners that are to receive capital punishment are given a fair and balanced trial, consisting of a jury of 6 of their peers.
2. The Magistrate may overrule any sentencing imposed upon any individual and pass judgement on any individual. This includes external threats like Nuclear Operatives, or members of Central Command.
3. The Magistrate may not overly impede the inner workings of Security.
4. The Magistrate may carry a flash on them at all times.
